description: Polymath stability evidence ledger. One entry per plugin in shared/polymath-catalog.json. Records the live-run, adopter, and connector/infra distinct-value evidence that backs promotion. Updated whenever a plugin gains live proof, an external adopter, or a promotion PR. The catalog's status field is the user-facing claim; this ledger is the receipt. Enforced by tools/check-stability-evidence.py (rule STABILITY-1). Human-readable view: docs/STABILITY-ROADMAP.md.

polymath-ai.notes: Golden-only experimental. Needs a bakeoff case + skill-triggering test to close the on-disk evidence loop (Iteration 3).

polymath-author.notes: Skill-shaped beta. Next: live bakeoff + live trigger on three phrasings, then external adopter.

polymath-backend.notes: Golden-only experimental. Needs a bakeoff case + skill-triggering test to close the on-disk evidence loop (Iteration 3).

polymath-communication.notes: Golden-only experimental. Needs a bakeoff case + skill-triggering test to close the on-disk evidence loop (Iteration 3).

polymath-connector-datadog.notes: Connector/infra at the experimental floor. Needs a bakeoff case + skill-triggering test and distinct-value evidence beyond the official MCP/CLI/LSP/docs surface (Iteration 4).
